title: StrikeCEM Configuration Schema
description: Official JSON Schema definition for StrikeCEM configuration files. Supports model definition (CAD/mesh), frequency sweeps, solvers (PO, MoM, Hybrid), mesh refinement, parallel execution, and output formats.

path.description: Path to the CAD or mesh file.

format.description: Whether the model file is a CAD file or a pre-meshed file.

axial.description: Whether the model has axial symmetry.

planar.description: Whether the model has planar symmetry.

sector_deg.description: Sector angle in degrees if using axial symmetry.

items.description: List of tags associated with the part.

mesh_source.description: Whether to use a pre-meshed model or tessellate from CAD.

cache_hash.description: Hash string to identify the model for caching purposes.

fix_nonmanifold.description: Whether to attempt to fix non-manifold edges in the mesh.

epsilon_r.description: Relative permittivity of the surrounding medium.

mu_r.description: Relative permeability of the surrounding medium.

sigma.description: Conductivity of the surrounding medium in S/m.

medium.description: Electromagnetic properties of the surrounding medium.

monostatic.description: Whether to compute monostatic RCS (same incident and scattered directions).

polarization_basis.description: Basis for defining incident wave polarization.

incident_amplitude.description: Amplitude of the incident electric field.

step.description: Azimuth step size in degrees. Must be > 0.
Elevation step size in degrees. Must be > 0.

list.description: Explicit list of [azimuth, elevation] angle pairs in degrees.

coarse_step.description: Initial coarse step size in degrees.

peak_window_deg.description: Window size around detected peaks to refine.

peak_threshold_dB.description: Threshold in dB above local average to consider a peak.

interpolate_mode.description: Method to interpolate RCS values between computed angles.

parallel_batch_size.description: Number of angles to process in parallel batches.

type.description: Type of electromagnetic solver to use.

edge_correction.description: Type of edge diffraction correction to apply in PO using PTD.

curvature_correction.description: Whether to apply curvature correction in PO.

shadowing.description: Whether to account for shadowing in PO using SBR.

illumination_model.description: Type of illumination model to use in PO.

po_options.description: Options specific to the Physical Optics (PO) solver.

equation.description: Type of integral equation to solve for MoM

basis.description: Type of basis functions to use for MoM

tolerance.description: Convergence tolerance for the iterative solver.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of iterations for the iterative solver.

reuse_matrix.description: Whether to reuse the system matrix for multiple frequencies if the mesh is unchanged.

preconditioner.description: Type of preconditioner to use for the iterative solver.

mom_options.description: Options specific to the Method of Moments (MoM) solver.

mom_regions.description: List of part tags or region names assigned to MoM domain.

hybrid_options.description: Options specific to the Hybrid PO-MoM solver.

lod.description: Level of detail for mesh generation.

global_h_over_lambda.description: Maximum panel size as a fraction of wavelength.

smooth_body_h_over_lambda.description: Panel size for smooth body regions as a fraction of wavelength.

edges_h_over_lambda.description: Panel size near edges as a fraction of wavelength.

min_edge_length_m.description: Minimum allowable edge length in model units to prevent over-refinement.

max_edge_length_m.description: Maximum allowable edge length in model units.

higher_order_panels.description: Whether to use higher-order curved panels instead of flat triangles.

facet_limit.description: Maximum number of facets to allow in the mesh.

transition_grading.description: Grading factor for mesh size transitions.

edge_strip_width_h_lambda.description: Width of the edge refinement strip as a fraction of wavelength.

symmetry_sector_deg.description: Sector angle in degrees if using axial symmetry.

quality_aspect_ratio_limit.description: Maximum allowed aspect ratio for mesh elements.

cpu_threads.description: Number of CPU threads to use for parallel processing.

use_gpu.description: Whether to use GPU acceleration if available.

gpu_device_index.description: Index of the GPU device to use if multiple are available.

batch_directions.description: Number of angles to process in each parallel batch.

angle_scheduler.description: Strategy for scheduling angle computations in parallel.

blas_backend.description: BLAS library to use for linear algebra operations.

max_memory_mb.description: Maximum memory to use in MB.

parallel.description: Parallel processing and hardware acceleration settings.

fields.description: List of data fields to include in the output. If `rcs_dBsm` and `rcs_sqm` are both chosen, units will follow `solver.rcs_units` setting.

precision.description: Number of decimal places for floating point output.

compression.description: Whether to compress the output file if supported.

include_metadata.description: Whether to include metadata in the output file.

hdf5_layout.description: Layout of datasets in HDF5 output.

checkpoint_every_n_angles.description: Frequency of checkpointing in number of angles.

resume_from_checkpoint.description: Path to a checkpoint file to resume from.
